headline: ICE рҹ’Ҙрҹҡ— MOMMY Sparks RED vs BLUE America CIVIL WAR рҹ”ҘрҹҮәрҹҮё
text:
Minneapolis рҹ”Ҙрҹҡ” turning into BATTLEGROUND рҹӣЎпёҸвҡ”пёҸ after ICE рҹ§Ҡрҹ‘®вҖҚвҷӮпёҸ agent DROPPED рҹ’Ҙрҹ”« a 37yo MOMMY Renee Good рҹҡ—рҹ’Ё in BROAD DAYLIGHT вҳҖпёҸрҹ“№ вҖ“ VIDEOS рҹ“ұрҹҺҘ from EVERY ANGLE рҹ‘Җ but FACTS? SPINNING рҹҢҖрҹӨЎ like a TRUMP TWEETSTORM рҹҗҰрҹ’Ё! Homeland Sec Kristi Noem рҹ§ўрҹҮәрҹҮё SLAYS: 'She WEAPONIZED рҹҡ—рҹ”Ә her CAR in DOMESTIC TERROR рҹҺӯрҹ’Ј ATTACK!' Donnie T рҹ‘‘рҹҚҠ Truth Social RANTS on Truth Social рҹ“ұрҹ”Ҙ: 'PROFESSIONAL AGITATOR рҹӨЎрҹҢ№ from RADICAL LEFT VIOLENCE MOB рҹҳЎрҹ”Ҙ!' But Dem CLOWNS рҹӨЎрҹ’ҷ counter: Mayor Jacob Frey рҹҳӨрҹҡ« yells 'RECKLESS рҹ’Ҙрҹ”« LETHAL FORCE!' and tells ICE to GTFO рҹҡӘвқҢ the city like BAD EX рҹ‘Ӣ!

Gov Tim Walz рҹ§”рҹ“ў calls it 'TOTALLY PREDICTABLE рҹҳ©рҹ“Ҳ & AVOIDABLE рҹӣ‘' вҖ“ blames TRUMP'S ICE SURGE рҹ§ҠрҹҡҖ flooding MN like SOMALI FRAUD WAVE рҹҢҠрҹ’ё! 'We've WARNED вҡ пёҸ for WEEKS your SENSATIONAL OPS are PUBLIC SAFETY THREAT рҹҳұрҹҡЁ!' Walz drops re-election BID рҹҸғвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ’Ҙ amid CORRUPTION TEA вҳ•рҹ§Ӯ in childcare рҹҚҺ & food aid рҹҚІ SCAMS! MN Nat Guard рҹӣЎпёҸвҡЎ on STANDBY cuz PROTESTORS рҹ‘ҘвңҠ hitting streets вҖ“ NO RIOTS PLZ рҹҷҸрҹ•ҠпёҸ, echoes GEORGE FLOYD 2020 MELTDOWN рҹ–ӨвңҠрҹ’Ҙ just MILES away!

IRONIC AF рҹҳӮрҹӨҰвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ: Trump ROASTED MN's SOMALI SQUAD рҹ‘ҘрҹҮёрҹҮҙ вҖ“ 'HUNDREDS OF THOUSANDS RIPPING OFF рҹӨ‘рҹ’ё our country, ASSAULTS on LAW & ORDER рҹҡ”вӣ“пёҸ!' Now FED ICE RAIDZ рҹ§Ҡрҹ”Қ targeting UNDOCU HOTSPOTS рҹҢ¶пёҸрҹҡ« вҖ“ 9th SHOOTING рҹ’Ҙрҹҡ— since Sept per NYT рҹ“°рҹ“Ҡ, ALL VEHICLE DRAMA рҹҸҺпёҸрҹ”«! Dems DEMAND oversight рҹ‘Җрҹ“Ӣ & RESTRAINT рҹӣ‘ but Trump crew PUSHES GAS рҹӣўпёҸрҹҡҖ: 'VOTER MANDATE 2024 рҹ—іпёҸрҹ”Ҙ + BORDER WINS рҹ“үрҹӣЎпёҸ!'

VEEP JD Vance рҹ§”рҹҮәрҹҮё X-RANTS рҹҗҰрҹҳЎ: 'GASLIGHTING OFF CHARTS рҹ“ҠрҹӨҜ вҖ“ ICE DUDE DOING JOB рҹ’Ә, SHE PLAYED RADICAL RIOTER рҹҺӯрҹҡ—!' Walz FIRES BACK рҹ”Ҙ: 'PREZ, VEEP, Noem SPITTING VERIFIABLY FALSE LIES рҹӨҘрҹ“№ on this MOMMY you NEVER KNEW рҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘§!' VIDS OPEN TO INTERP рҹҢҖрҹ‘Җ вҖ“ RED sees TERROR рҹҡЁрҹ”ҙ, BLUE sees MURDER рҹ’”рҹ”ө! US CHASM рҹ•іпёҸрҹҮәрҹҮё WIDER THAN GRAND CANYON рҹҸңпёҸрҹҳ©, politics SPLIT like BAD DIVORCE рҹ’”вҡ–пёҸ! Trump 2.0 TWISTS рҹҢҖрҹ‘‘ got us RIVETED рҹ“әрҹҚҝ вҖ“ sign up for Unspun deets! рҹ“°рҹ”„
